scope: concordance words vs ai-dictionary primary keys with case-normalized primary matching
notes: This report compares concordance surface forms against AI Dictionary primary keys, while also recognizing lowercase/case-normalized primary matches.
Primary case-variant matches are concordance words already covered by an existing primary AI Dictionary entry that differs only by case.
Alias-only matches are words that resolve through AI Dictionary aliases but do not yet exist as primary entries.
The lowercase alias-only subset is the cleanest candidate pool for future primary-word promotion.
